task_completion.description: Compare the original and vendor documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for LibreOffice Writer showing the 'Compare Document' dialog or a document with visible redline track changes (e.g., colored text, strikethroughs for deletions, underlines for insertions).
Look for the file 'contract_comparison.odt' in a file manager, a 'Save As' dialog, or the LibreOffice window title bar.

Look for the 'Manage Changes' dialog in LibreOffice being used to accept or reject modifications, specifically interacting with changes related to Payment Terms, Force Majeure, Arbitration, and Limitation of Liability.

task_completion.description: Verify the final document contains the correct resolved terms
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text in the final document showing '45 days', 'Force Majeure', 'Arbitration', and '$1,000,000'. Ensure '30 days' and '$500,000' are not present.
Look for the file 'contract_final_resolved.odt' in a file manager, a 'Save As' dialog, or the LibreOffice window title bar.

integrity.description: Agent used LibreOffice Writer GUI to perform the comparison and resolve changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the LibreOffice Writer interface being actively used to open, compare, and edit the documents.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the output files
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent did not run Python scripts or other command-line tools to programmatically create the .odt files.

integrity.description: The comparison document uses genuine LibreOffice track changes functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard LibreOffice track changes indicators (e.g., marginal lines, Manage Changes dialog) rather than manually applied text colors or strikethrough formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires comparing '/home/ga/Documents/contract_v1_original.odt' and '/home/ga/Documents/contract_v2_vendor.odt'. The comparison must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/contract_comparison.odt'. The final resolved document must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/contract_final_resolved.odt'. The final document MUST contain the strings '45 days', 'Force Majeure', 'Arbitration', and '$1,000,000'. It MUST NOT contain '30 days' or '$500,000'.
